description: Detects C# local variable declarations that instantiate IDisposable types outside a using statement. Simplified from Rust: flags all object_creation_expression nodes. Cannot filter by known-disposable type list (FileStream, HttpClient, SqlConnection, etc.) or verify using statement wrapping. Higher false positive rate.

flag.message: Object creation detected -- if this type implements IDisposable, wrap it in a using statement to prevent resource leaks.
